Notes

Welcome to my notes! Below you’ll find lecture notes from my master’s at EPFL alongside independent learning notes on topics in theoretical physics and mathematics. Writing things down independently is, I think, the best way to actually understand them — these may contain mistakes and rough edges, but I hope they’re still useful.

Source files live on my GitHub. The note templates are open-sourced as well: LaTeX template · Typst template.

EPFL Lecture Notes

Course notes from my master's at EPFL.

  • QFT ZH Quantum Field Theory 1 PDF · Source
  • QFT EN Quantum Field Theory 2 PDF · Source
  • GR ZH General Relativity and Cosmology 1 PDF · Source
  • GR EN General Relativity and Cosmology 2 PDF · Source
  • QM ZH Quantum Mechanics 3 PDF · Source
  • QM EN Quantum Mechanics 4 PDF · Source
  • QI ZH Quantum Information Theory PDF · Source

Learning Notes

Independent notes on topics in theoretical physics and mathematics.

Topic
No notes match your filters.

2+1D Gravity

  • EN 2+1 Dimensional Gravity and Chern–Simons Theory2+1d gravity and its relation to Chern–Simons theory; a naive real-polarization quantization in the zero-cosmological-constant case. PDF · Source

2D CFT

  • EN Basic CFTConcise introduction to 2D CFT following the Yellow Book. A starting point — the bootstrapping construction is more systematic. PDF · Source
  • EN Basic BCFTBoundary CFT by analogy with ordinary QFT. Useful for building intuition before turning to the bootstrap formulation. PDF · Source
  • EN Crossing of RCFT Conformal BlocksCrossing symmetry of conformal blocks — one of the central features of 2D CFT. PDF · Source
  • EN Bulk and Boundary Sewing ConstraintsLewellen's sewing constraints in 2D CFT with boundary. PDF · Source
  • EN Boundary States of Majorana CFTBoundary states of Majorana CFT — the simplest example of fermionic CFT with boundary. PDF · Source
  • EN Fermionic Virasoro Minimal ModelsFermionic Virasoro minimal models, with their boundary structure. PDF · Source

CMT

  • EN Quantum Hall EffectInteger and fractional quantum Hall effect in one note. PDF · Source

Math

  • EN Modular Tensor CategoryModular Tensor Categories with applications to CFT and TQFT. PDF · Source
  • EN Mathematical Aspects of Gauge Field TheoryFoundations of gauge theory: homology, cohomology, fiber bundles, connections, the Index Theorem, and characteristic classes. PDF · Source

QFT

  • EN Core Concepts in QFTFundamental and concise notes on important concepts in QFT. PDF · Source
